General.Name: ecotel communication ag
General.Description: ecotel communication ag provides marketing information and telecommunication solutions in Germany. The company operates through ecotel Business Customers and ecotel Wholesale segments. The ecotel Business Customers segment offers voice and data services; and The ecotel Wholesale Solutions segment provides cross-network trading services in telephone minutes and marketing of data lines for national and international carriers. It also offers online audio services for hosting streaming and podcasts. It serves automotive, healthcare, call center, and construction industries. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Düsseldorf, Germany.
